name: privacy-guard
description: AI-powered privacy checks before commits and for your dependencies

privacyGuard.anthropicApiKey.description: Anthropic API key. Get one at https://console.anthropic.com

privacyGuard.openaiApiKey.description: OpenAI API key. Get one at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

privacyGuard.openrouterApiKey.description: OpenRouter API key. Get one at https://openrouter.ai/keys

privacyGuard.provider.description: AI provider to use. Set apiKey to match the chosen provider.
enumDescriptions: OpenRouter — access hundreds of models with one key

privacyGuard.openRouterModel.description: Model slug to use when provider is openrouter. See openrouter.ai/models for the full list.

privacyGuard.outboundFilterMode.description: Self-defense for Privacy Guard's own LLM calls. Controls what happens when the diff Privacy Guard is about to send to the AI provider itself contains sensitive values.
enumDescriptions: Replace sensitive values with [REDACTED:RULE-ID] tokens before sending (recommended).
Refuse to call the AI when a HIGH-severity match is found; fall back to NLP-only result.
Send the prompt unchanged but show a warning notification listing what was sent.
Send the prompt as-is with no filtering (not recommended).
